data.title: Global Video Streaming Market to Reach USD 885.95 Billion by 2036 as Asia-Pacific and North America Drive Digital Expansion; Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+ and YouTube Lead Platform Innovation
data.description: Rapidly increasing mobile usage in India and China, along with the dominance of premium content in the U.S., coupled with the emergence of AI-driven streaming platforms, are causing significant shifts in the worldwide entertainment industry. A recent study by Future Market Insights reveals that in 2026, the global video consumption patterns continue to evolve. With a population of over 1.3 billion, India stands out as a key market, witnessing a surge in mobile-first viewing habits. Similarly, China has embraced mobile technology, contributing to the changing entertainment landscape. Meanwhile, the U.S. remains a leader in providing top-notch content experiences, setting a precedent for the global market. The integration of artificial intelligence in streaming services is also reshaping how content is delivered and consumed. This transformation underscores the ongoing revolution in how entertainment is accessed and enjoyed worldwide, showcasing the dynamic nature of the industry.

data.title: Gresham Smith Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies for the Second Year in a Row
data.description: Nashville-based architecture firm Gresham Smith has achieved the impressive ranking of number 4 in the industry. The company recently secured a spot on Fast Company's esteemed list of the World's Most Innovative Companies for the latest year, further solidifying its reputation within the industry. This recognition highlights businesses that demonstrate forward-thinking and creativity.

data.title: E-Bike Market Worth USD 153.39 Billion by 2032, Exclusive Report by Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 24, 2026, a report by Maximize Market Research predicts significant growth in the E-Bike Market. It is projected to increase from USD 68.10 billion in 2025 to USD 153.41 billion by 2032, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.3% over the forecast period. The comprehensive report offers detailed insights into this market trend.

data.title: NYSE partners with Securitize for tokenized securities, marking Wall Street's increasing crypto ties.
data.description: Securitize has been chosen by the New York Stock Exchange to serve as a "digital transfer agent" for a specialized platform dealing with tokenized securities.

data.title: Fosun Pharma Announces 2025 Annual Results
data.description: Fosun Pharma, a leading global pharmaceutical and healthcare company, credited its high-quality growth to innovation and globalization. The company, listed under the stock codes 600196.SH and 02196.HK, revealed its annual report for 2025 on March 24, 2026 in Shanghai.

data.title: KNIPEX Tools Named One of the 2026 Best & Brightest Companies to Work For® in the Nation
data.description: Buffalo Grove, Illinois - In a March 24, 2026 announcement, KNIPEX Tools shared their pride at being named among the 2026 Best & Brightest Companies to Work For® in the Nation and received the same honor for the Chicago region. This recognition underscores their commitment to creating a positive work environment.

data.title: BBB National Programs Applauds Global CBPR 2.0 Requirements, a Key Step Toward Strengthening International Data Privacy Standards
data.description: Celebrating the progress made, BBB National Programs commended the Global Cross-Border Privacy Rules (CBPR) Forum and governments for completing the Global CBPR 2.0 requirements on March 24, 2026. This updated framework marks a major overhaul aimed at enhancing privacy rules across borders.

data.title: Perforce 2026 State of Open Source Report Highlights Shift Toward Digital Autonomy in the EU
data.description: Concerns about being tied to a specific vendor is a major reason for companies transitioning to open source software, showing a 68% increase from last year. This report was released in Minneapolis on March 24, 2026. Perforce Software, a leading DevOps company catering to international teams looking to implement AI advancements on a large scale, partnered with the Open Source community to shed light on this trend.

data.title: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Customers Can Get Help with Seasonal Energy Bills
data.description: In Greensburg, Pennsylvania, as of March 24, 2026, the recent harsh winter led to increased usage of heating systems in households. This surge in energy consumption resulted in elevated electric bills for many residents. As temperatures begin to rise with the onset of warmer weather, customers are being urged to take proactive steps to manage their energy consumption effectively.

data.title: PPMD Provides $250,000 in Funding to Secretome Therapeutics Through PPMD Venture Pathways Program to Support Development of Cardiac Cell Therapy
data.description: In an announcement made today in Washington on March 24, 2026, Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy (PPMD), the prominent U.S. non-profit organization dedicated to advancing care, research, and advocacy for Duchenne and Becker muscular dystrophy, disclosed a partnership with Secretome Therapeutics. This collaboration marks a significant step in advancing efforts to combat these diseases. PPMD has contributed to this initiative, highlighting the commitment to driving progress in addressing muscular dystrophy.

data.title: Vilore Foods Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: San Antonio-based company Vilore Foods has recently been recognized alongside industry giants such as Google, Nvidia, Adidas, and Walmart by Fast Company. Known for specializing in Hispanic food and beverage products, Vilore Foods joins this prestigious list of the World's Most innovative companies. This acknowledgment highlights the company's dedication and success in its field.

data.title: APTIM-EnergySolutions JV Awarded Seat on $999M Navy Contract for Demolition Work at Hunters Point Naval Shipyard
data.description: APTIM Radiological Services has secured a position to vie for task orders amounting to $999 million for demolition, construction, supervision, and other associated tasks. The aim is to support property transfer for beneficial reuse. This development was announced in San Francisco on March 24, 2026.
